nasb.text: You are to perform My judgments and keep My statutes, to live in accord with them; I am the Lord your God.

esv.text: You shall follow my rules and keep my statutes and walk in them. I am the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 你們要遵行我的典章，謹守我的律例，要遵照奉行；我是耶和華你們的　神。

ccb.text: 你们必须遵行我的典章，持守我的律例。我是你们的上帝耶和华。
